name: Домен Войны
description: War has many manifestations. It can make heroes of ordinary people. It can be desperate and horrific, with acts of cruelty and cowardice eclipsing instances of excellence and courage. In either case, the gods of war watch over warriors and reward them for their great deeds. The clerics of such gods excel in battle, inspiring others to fight the good fight or offering acts of violence as prayers. Gods of war include champions of honor and chivalry (such as {@deity Torm}, {@deity Heironeous}, and {@deity Kiri-Jolith}) as well as gods of destruction and pillage (such as {@deity Erythnul}, the Fury, {@deity Gruumsh}, and {@deity Ares}) and gods of conquest and domination (such as {@deity Bane}, {@deity Hextor}, and {@deity Maglubiyet}).
shortDescription: Warrior of Faith Blessed for Battle

features.name: War Domain Spells
features.description: Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the War Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: War Priest
features.description: Your god delivers bolts of inspiration to you while you are engaged in battle. When you take the {@action Attack} action, you can make one extra attack as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Guided Strike
features.description: When you or a creature within 30 feet of you misses with an attack roll, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity and grant a +10 bonus to the roll, potentially turning the miss into a hit.

features.name: War God's Blessing
features.description: You can use your Guided Strike to benefit another creature's attack roll rather than your own. When a creature within 30 feet of you misses with an attack roll, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity and grant a +10 bonus to the creature's roll, potentially turning the miss into a hit.

features.name: Avatar of Battle
features.description: You gain {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
